whyUs.officialProgram: Program regulated and supervised by official bodies

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: An official mechanism that funds 100% of thermal insulation works. Here's how it works, step by step:

step1.title: TrueGreen installs and advances all costs
step1.description: Our team performs the complete insulation installation. TrueGreen advances 100% of costs: materials, labor, and transport. You pay nothing.
step1.summary: We install complete insulation. TrueGreen advances all costs.

step2.title: We handle all documentation
step2.description: We prepare the complete technical file: measurements, material certificates, energy savings calculations. You don't need to do any paperwork.
step2.summary: We prepare the entire technical file. You do nothing.

step3.title: Independent verification
step3.description: An accredited verification body reviews and validates that the energy savings are real and comply with regulations.
step3.summary: An accredited body verifies the energy savings.

step4.title: Validation and compensation
step4.description: The verified file is submitted to the energy company, which purchases the Energy Savings Certificates to fulfill its legal quota.
step4.summary: The energy company compensates the costs. The process is supervised.

howItWorks.result: The customer pays nothing. TrueGreen is compensated by the energy company. The company fulfills its legal quota. The entire process is supervised.
howItWorks.legalLink: Check the legal framework on the official page →

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Nothing speaks better about the quality of our work than the experience of those who have already chosen us.
testimonials.verifiedSubtitle: Real ratings from homeowners who already enjoy a more efficient home.

reviews.name: Alejandro García
reviews.text: I saw the ad online, filled out the form and within less than a week everything was done. I was impressed by the team's professionalism and efficiency.

reviews.name: Elena Rodríguez
reviews.text: Splendid work. Very polite workers who explained all the steps, very clean and careful. We were surprised by the speed and trust. And it's free!

reviews.name: Javier López
reviews.text: Thank you TrueGreen for the attic insulation. I was pleasantly surprised they did it for free, an incredible detail!

reviews.name: María Sánchez
reviews.text: Excellent experience from start to finish. The team was punctual, professional, and clean. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Carlos Martínez
reviews.text: I couldn't believe it could be free, but everything was confirmed. Quality work, at no cost to us.

qa.title: Professional standards and official oversight
qa.lead: Truegreen Energy applies rigorous protocols aligned with the energy savings certificate (CAE) programme, consistent with leading practice in the Spanish energy-efficiency sector.
checklist: Technical and documentary verification of every installation
Coordination with an accredited verification body
Full traceability of the file through to compensation
qa.panel1Body: We work in accordance with Royal Decree 36/2023 and current energy-efficiency regulations. Each intervention is documented for review by the competent bodies.
qa.panel2Body: From the initial study to file closure we follow a structured flow: measurements, product certificates, savings calculation and submission in line with programme requirements.

block1.title: Measurable results in consumption and comfort
block1.body: Like reference programmes in the sector, we prioritise interventions with a real impact on bills and thermal comfort. Attic insulation reduces roof heat losses and stabilises indoor conditions year-round.

block2.title: Friction-free support for homeowners
block2.body: We manage relations with verifiers and energy companies so you do not have to handle the paperwork. Our team keeps you clearly informed at every stage, with no small print on the scope of the free service.

block1.title: Legal framework and CAE transparency
block1.body: The energy savings certificate mechanism funds efficiency measures through energy-sector obligations. Truegreen Energy acts as a programme agent, following the same operational logic described by leading organisations for RD 36/2023.

block2.title: Indicative timelines and follow-up
block2.body: After your request we schedule the technical visit, installation and documentation closure within a predictable calendar. We keep you informed of file status until validation, at no cost to your home.

block1.title: Thermal comfort and building envelope performance
block1.body: Blown mineral wool in the attic forms a continuous barrier that limits heat flow in winter and overheating in summer, in line with efficiency guidance for homes with uninhabitable roof spaces.

block2.title: Material sustainability and safety
block2.body: We use certified solutions that are environmentally sound and have appropriate reaction-to-fire properties for building use. Installation is clean, without demolition or prolonged disruption.

block1.title: Progressive coverage and local teams
block1.body: We deploy crews and technicians in the provinces listed to reduce travel and meet deadlines. If your municipality is in an active region, you can request a no-obligation study to confirm technical viability.

block2.title: Consistent quality in every region we serve
block2.body: A single working protocol—from survey to documentation—ensures consistency across Castile and León, Castile-La Mancha, Madrid, Galicia, Aragon and the other regions shown on the map.

block1.title: Trust backed by verifiable reviews
block1.body: We value transparency: public ratings reflect real experiences after installation. As on leading sector portals, client satisfaction is a key measure of our service.

block2.title: Continuous improvement from feedback
block2.body: We review comments and issues to refine processes, field-team training and homeowner communication. Every project helps us maintain the standard expected from the official programme.

footer.description: Professional energy efficiency solutions for your home. 100% officially funded program.

about.title: About TrueGreen
about.subtitle: Our mission is to make energy efficiency accessible to everyone.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete thermal insulation and energy efficiency solutions.

faq.sectionSubtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our services.

items.question: Is it really free?
items.answer: Yes, the official program funds 100% of installation costs. You don't need to pay anything upfront and there are no hidden fees.

items.question: How long does installation take?
items.answer: Complete installation usually takes between 2 and 4 hours, depending on the attic size.

items.question: What type of insulation do you use?
items.answer: We use blown mineral wool, a certified, fireproof and ecological material with excellent thermal insulation properties.

items.question: Who can benefit from the program?
items.answer: Any homeowner with an uninsulated attic or loft can apply. There are no income requirements.

items.question: Do I need to handle any paperwork?
items.answer: No, our team handles all administrative procedures and necessary documentation.
